title: SubscriptionLicense
description: SubscriptionLicense schema from Pure1 Public REST API

allOf.description:
A built-in resource. Many are singletons predefined by Purity (e.g., support
settings). Some correspond to a piece of software, like an app, or hardware,
like a controller. Others are created by the system in response to some event
(e.g., alerts, audit records).

Typically, a user can't create, delete or rename a built-in resource. A few
can be created or deleted, but not renamed because the names are meaningful
to Purity (e.g., VIFs).

id.description: A non-modifiable, globally unique ID chosen by the system.

name.description: A non-modifiable, locally unique name chosen by the system.

allOf.description: A license belonging to a Pure1 subscription.

average_on_demand.description:
Estimated daily on-demand usage of the license from the current calendar
quarter to date.
average_on_demand.title: Current_metric

expiration_date.description:
Date when the license expires.
Represented as a timestamp of 00:00 on that date in UTC, in
milliseconds since UNIX epoch.

last_updated_date.description:
The date of the last amendment to the current license.
Represented as a timestamp of 00:00 on that date in UTC, in
milliseconds since UNIX epoch.

marketplace_partner.description: Reference information about the marketplace partner of this license.
marketplace_partner.title: Marketplace_partner

pre_ratio.description: The pre-reduced & encrypted ratio calculated at license level.

quarter_on_demand.description: Estimated total on-demand usage of the license of the current calendar quarter to date.
quarter_on_demand.title: Current_metric

reservation.description: Current reservation amount of the license.
reservation.title: Current_metric

resources.description: References to the resources that operate under this license.

service_tier.description: The tier of the service for the license.

start_date.description:
Date when the license starts.
Represented as a timestamp of 00:00 on that date in UTC, in
milliseconds since UNIX epoch.

subscription.description: A reference to which subscription this license belongs.
subscription.title: FixedReference

usage.description: Usage of the license, averaged over the last day.
usage.title: Current_metric
